# Lemolite Technologies LLP

> A dedicated custom software development company that consults, designs, builds, and scales startups and businesses into industry leaders.

## About
Lemolite Technologies LLP is a full-service custom software development company with 9+ years of experience and 80+ startups built. We serve clients across the UK, Dubai, Doha, and India. Our expertise spans web development, mobile apps, AI/ML, IoT, e-commerce, and intelligent automation — helping businesses across industries transform their digital vision into reality.

## Core Services
- [Custom Software Development](https://lemolite.com/services/custom-software-development): Tailored software solutions built for your unique business needs
- [Web Development](https://lemolite.com/services/web-development): Fast, scalable, and SEO-optimized websites and web apps
- [Mobile App Development](https://lemolite.com/services/mobile-app-development): iOS and Android apps built for performance and scale
- [UI/UX Design](https://lemolite.com/services/ui-ux-design): User-first interfaces that drive engagement and conversions
- [E-Commerce Development](https://lemolite.com/services/e-commerce): Conversion-optimized online stores and platforms
- [AI & ML Development](https://lemolite.com/services/ai-ml-development): Intelligent automation and machine learning solutions
- [IoT Development](https://lemolite.com/services/internet-of-things): Connected device solutions for smart businesses
- [Chatbot Development](https://lemolite.com/services/chatbot-development): AI-powered chatbots for customer support and automation
- [Voicebot Development](https://lemolite.com/services/voicebot-development): Voice-enabled automation solutions
- [OT Cybersecurity](https://lemolite.com/services/ot-cybersecurity): Secure product lifecycle solutions
